notes: Deployed and wired via deploy/deploy.js (referral registry authorized caller, rating registry reporter, ownership + feeRecipient transferred to platformOwner). Addresses are identical to the bscTestnet deployment because the same deployer address was used with the same nonce sequence on both chains (CREATE address derivation depends only on sender+nonce, not chain ID) -- this is expected, not a mistake. NOT audited: keep wagerAmount at 0 (free play only) until a professional Solidity audit of the escrow/payout logic is complete. See backgammon/README.md.
